name: Infiltrator's Key (Dormant)
description:
This mithral skeleton key was forged using the blood of twelve master thieves executed for trying to steal magic items during the Age of Arcanum.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Dormant", "entries": ["The Infiltrator's Key grants the following benefits in its dormant state:", {"type": "list", "items": ["The key can be used as {@item thieves' tools|phb} for the purpose of opening locks. When using the key, you are considered proficient in {@item thieves' tools|PHB} and you have advantage on ability
